title: Sarvam AI launches startup program: Here's all about it and what it offers
paragraph: AI is the era for builders. We want to compound that momentum by powering the startup ecosystem with high-quality models and tools so they can create with full agency.

title: Sarvam AI launches startup program: Here's all about it and what it offers
paragraph: Indian generative AI company Sarvam AI has announced a new programme to help startups build artificial intelligence products in India. The initiative, the Sarvam Startup Programme, is intended for early-stage companies looking to develop applications using the firm’s models and technical infrastructure.The company shared details of the program in a series of posts on X on Thursday. The idea, it said, is simple - give developers access to tools and computing support so they can focus on building products rather than setting up complex AI systems from scratch.“Today, we're launching the Sarvam Startup Programme. AI is the era for builders. We want to compound that momentum by powering the startup ecosystem with high-quality models and tools so they can create with full agency,” the company wrote.Startups selected for the programme will receive API credits for six to twelve months, depending on how much infrastructure they require. These credits are designed to cover usage costs while companies experiment with and deploy AI features.Participants will also be able to use Sarvam’s broader set of AI tools. These include:Speech-to-Text,Text-to-Speech,Translation,Chat Completionand Document Intelligence APIs.The company says its platform currently supports more than 22 Indian languages along with English. That multilingual support has been a central focus for Sarvam AI, especially as many global AI systems still struggle with regional language accuracy.Another component of the program involves direct engineering access. Startups will be able to work with Sarvam’s technical team if they run into integration or scaling issues. The company also said selected projects could receive co-branded case studies and launch amplification once products go live.Sarvam AI was founded by engineers Vivek Raghavan and Pratyush Kumar. The company has positioned itself as part of India’s broader effort to develop homegrown generative AI infrastructure rather than relying entirely on overseas models.The firm gained wider attention recently at the India AI Impact Summit 2026 in New Delhi, where it showcased several of its AI systems and language capabilities.Much of the company’s work so far has focused on foundational models and APIs built for multilingual environments. This includes tools designed to work across India’s diverse language landscape, where translation, speech recognition and text generation can vary widely in accuracy.For now, the Sarvam Startup Programme is open to applications. The company has not said how many startups it plans to accept in the first round. Applications for the program are already open through the company’s website.

title: Tata Elxsi launches DevStudio.ai to speed up automotive software engineering
paragraph: Tata Elxsi Limited has launched DevStudio.ai, a generative AI platform designed to accelerate automotive software engineering for original equipment manufacturers (OEMs), system suppliers and semiconductor companies.In an exchange filing on Thursday, March 5, the company said the new platform is a multi-agent generative AI solution aligned with Automotive SPICE (ASPICE) standards, aimed at speeding up the automotive software development lifecycle while maintaining industry quality and compliance requirements.DevStudio.ai is designed to act as an AI co-engineer across different stages of software development, including requirements, architecture, implementation, testing and qualification.The platform integrates with commonly used OEM and tier-1 engineering toolchains and supports deployment on both cloud-based infrastructure and secure on-premise environments.Sundar Ganapathi, Chief Technology Officer – Automotive at Tata Elxsi, said the automotive industry is facing growing "competitive" pressure to accelerate software development "at China speed" while maintaining safety and regulatory standards.He added, "DevStudio.ai helps address this challenge. It brings the power of generative AI into the automotive software development lifecycle. This enables OEMs and suppliers accelerate development, while maintaining the rigour required for safety-critical automotive systems."Tata Elxsi said the platform has already been deployed in select programmes with global OEMs and tier-1 suppliers across North America, Japan and India. Early implementations have shown improvements in development speed and productivity across domains such as body, chassis, infotainment and software-defined vehicle (SDV) architectures.Pallavi Dalal, Head of Automotive GenAI and AI Practice at Tata Elxsi, said the platform reflects the company’s efforts to combine automotive domain expertise with generative AI capabilities to support next-generation vehicle software development.Tata Elxsi provides design and technology services to industries, including automotive, communications, healthcare and media, and works with global OEMs and suppliers on engineering services spanning product design, software development and digital transformation.

title: Tata Elxsi launches DevStudio.ai to speed up automotive software engineering
paragraph: For the December quarter, the company's revenue increased 3.8% sequentially to ₹953.5 crore from ₹918.1 crore in Q2. Its net profit declined 29.6% quarter-on-quarter to ₹109 crore from ₹154.8 crore. However, EBIT rose 17.7% to ₹199.9 crore.

title: Tata Elxsi launches DevStudio.ai to speed up automotive software engineering
paragraph: Shares of Tata Elxsi ended nearly 1% higher at ₹4,400 ahead of the announcement on Thursday, March 5. The stock has fallen 18.61% over the past month.

title: Tata Elxsi launches multi-agent gen-AI platform
paragraph: Tata Elxsi said it has launched DevStudio.ai, a multi-agent generative AI platform designed to accelerate the automotive software development lifecycle (SDLC) for original equipment manufacturers (OEMs), system suppliers, and semiconductor companies.

title: Tata Elxsi launches multi-agent gen-AI platform
paragraph: The platform integrates multiple AI agents to automate and streamline key stages of automotive software engineering, enabling faster design, coding, testing, and validation of software systems.

title: Tata Elxsi launches multi-agent gen-AI platform
paragraph: DevStudio.ai is aligned with ASPICE (Automotive Software Process Improvement and Capability Determination) standards and supports major stages of the ASPICE V-cycle, including system and software requirements, architecture, implementation, testing, and qualification, while maintaining end-to-end traceability across the development lifecycle.

title: Tata Elxsi launches multi-agent gen-AI platform
paragraph: The solution enables collaboration between automotive engineers and AI across engineering workflows and can operate on both cloud infrastructure and air-gapped on-premise environments, offering flexibility aligned with enterprise infrastructure and AI policies.

title: Tata Elxsi launches multi-agent gen-AI platform
paragraph: According to the company, the platform is currently being deployed in select programs with global OEMs and Tier-1 suppliers across North America, Japan, and India, spanning body, chassis, infotainment, and software-defined vehicle (SDV) architectures. Early deployments have demonstrated improvements in productivity and speed-to-market.

title: Tata Elxsi launches multi-agent gen-AI platform
paragraph: Sundar Ganapathi, Chief Technology Officer Automotive, Tata Elxsi, said, The automotive industry is at an inflection point. Competitive pressures now demand software development at China's speed. At the same time, companies must maintain automotive-grade quality and meet global industry standards. DevStudio.ai helps address this challenge. It brings the power of generative AI into the automotive software development lifecycle. This enables OEMs and suppliers to accelerate development while maintaining the rigor required for safety-critical automotive systems.

title: Tata Elxsi launches multi-agent gen-AI platform
paragraph: Tata Elxsi is amongst the worlds leading providers of design and technology services across industries, including automotive, broadcast, communications, healthcare, and transportation.

title: Tata Elxsi launches multi-agent gen-AI platform
paragraph: The company reported a 45.28% decline in net profit to Rs 108.89 crore in Q3 FY26 as against Rs 199 crore posted in Q3 FY25. However, revenue from operations rose 1.52% to Rs 953.47 crore in Q3 FY26 as against Rs 939.17 crore posted in Q3 FY25.

title: Generative AI cuts software task time by up to 70 per cent, report finds
paragraph: The adoption of Generative Artificial Intelligence (AI) tools in software development can significantly boost productivity and reduce task completion time, according to a report by Ness, a digital engineering services company, and Zinnov, a global management consulting firm.

title: Generative AI cuts software task time by up to 70 per cent, report finds
paragraph: The report highlighted that Generative AI tools such as Copilot and CodeWhisperer have the potential to transform software engineering productivity, particularly in routine development tasks.

title: Generative AI cuts software task time by up to 70 per cent, report finds
paragraph: It stated: “Generative AI (GAI) has a significant impact on repeatable sustenance activities and reducing knowledge barriers... 70% reduction in task completion time for existing code updates..... 48% reduction in task completion time for senior engineers.”

title: Generative AI cuts software task time by up to 70 per cent, report finds
paragraph: Ness and Zinnov conducted a detailed analysis of more than 100 software engineers across various use cases and development environments to assess the real-world impact of Generative AI in software development.

title: Generative AI cuts software task time by up to 70 per cent, report finds
paragraph: The study found that task completion time for existing code updates can be reduced by as much as 70 per cent when developers use Generative AI tools. This indicates that AI can be particularly effective in repetitive coding activities and maintenance work.

title: Generative AI cuts software task time by up to 70 per cent, report finds
paragraph: Generative AI tools also improve productivity among engineers with different levels of experience. Senior engineers experienced a 48 per cent reduction in task completion time when using these tools.

title: Generative AI cuts software task time by up to 70 per cent, report finds
paragraph: However, the impact of Generative AI varies depending on several factors, including the experience level of engineers, the complexity of the coding task, and the development environment.

title: Generative AI cuts software task time by up to 70 per cent, report finds
paragraph: In highly complex coding tasks, productivity gains from AI tools appear more limited. The study observed that high code complexity environments saw around a 10 per cent reduction in task completion time, suggesting that skilled engineers will continue to play a crucial role in complex software development.

title: Generative AI cuts software task time by up to 70 per cent, report finds
paragraph: The report further noted that the use of Generative AI can improve knowledge sharing and collaboration within development teams. Around 70 per cent of engineers reported improved engagement while working with these tools. Such tools can reduce knowledge barriers between teams and help developers work more effectively in distributed global teams.

title: Generative AI cuts software task time by up to 70 per cent, report finds
paragraph: Ness used its proprietary Matrix platform — a dynamic, data-driven engineering platform — to monitor key engineering performance indicators such as quality, productivity, responsiveness, and code quality during the study.

title: Generative AI cuts software task time by up to 70 per cent, report finds
paragraph: The report concluded that Generative AI has strong transformative potential in software engineering if used appropriately. Its overall impact will depend on factors such as engineer seniority, task type, and the complexity of the code involved.

title: Generative AI in Insurance: Keerthi Amistapuram Explores Smarter Claims Documentation and Customer Communication
paragraph: With the insurance companies coping with increased claim frequency, comprehensive operations, and changing customer demands, automation has been placed at the heart of enhancing efficiency. Keerthi Amistapuram, a technology expert in the field of enterprise insurance tools and AI-driven systems, has discussed the way in which generative artificial intelligence can facilitate the claims documentation process and enhance formalized customer interaction.

title: Generative AI in Insurance: Keerthi Amistapuram Explores Smarter Claims Documentation and Customer Communication
paragraph: The work titled Generative AI in Insurance: Automating Claims Documentation and Customer Communication, is a research paper published by the Turkish Journal of Computer and Mathematics Education and provides an in-depth examination of how AI systems based on large language models could be implemented into the insurance workflow in a responsible manner.

title: Generative AI in Insurance: Keerthi Amistapuram Explores Smarter Claims Documentation and Customer Communication
paragraph: Insurance has a base level in risk management in any industry, but most claims functions are still based on ineffective systems with manual repetitive processes. The process of documentation writing, evidence synthesis and communicating policyholder can in many cases be time consuming and demands human resources and multi-team coordination.

title: Generative AI in Insurance: Keerthi Amistapuram Explores Smarter Claims Documentation and Customer Communication
paragraph: Keerthi in her works defines claims documentation and customer communication as the two areas of operation where generative AI can be used to provide systematic benefits. Instead of setting AI as something that has to replace human experience, she makes it a support layer that will increase the productivity without compromising control and responsibility.

title: Generative AI in Insurance: Keerthi Amistapuram Explores Smarter Claims Documentation and Customer Communication
paragraph: The fundamental aspect of Keerthi is the use of the large language models which have the ability to generate contextual texts. Such models have the potential of converting structured claim information, file notes, transcripts and other supporting documents into consistent and standardized narrations.

title: Generative AI in Insurance: Keerthi Amistapuram Explores Smarter Claims Documentation and Customer Communication
paragraph: Through these AI features integrated into scalable enterprise platforms, insurers will be able to add automation without breaking the current infrastructure. Its architecture focuses on the integration with the microservices-based systems and secure APIs, thus allowing a gradual adoption.

title: Generative AI in Insurance: Keerthi Amistapuram Explores Smarter Claims Documentation and Customer Communication
paragraph: Claims documentation is one of the labor-intensive operations in insurance business. Every statement needs story summaries, formal reports and documentation that are aligned with compliance and tend to differ across people in terms of writing styles and interpretation.

title: Generative AI in Insurance: Keerthi Amistapuram Explores Smarter Claims Documentation and Customer Communication
paragraph: The concepts of operational modeling used in the paper include the concepts of Little Law to show that the average handling time can be minimized to reduce the backlog. As documentation cycles become more efficient, throughput will be improved without a necessarily higher staffing level.

title: Generative AI in Insurance: Keerthi Amistapuram Explores Smarter Claims Documentation and Customer Communication
paragraph: Nevertheless, the paper makes it clear that AI generated documentation is to be backed by verification layers. Organized data validation, automated factual cross checking, and human review checkpoints are introduced as protective measures of inaccuracies.

title: Generative AI in Insurance: Keerthi Amistapuram Explores Smarter Claims Documentation and Customer Communication
paragraph: In addition to documentation, Keerthi focuses on the way generative AI can facilitate systematic engagement with customers. The conversational AI systems will help to respond to the general policy-related questions and lead the customers through information processes.

title: Generative AI in Insurance: Keerthi Amistapuram Explores Smarter Claims Documentation and Customer Communication
paragraph: The model emphasizes the application of Retrieval Augmented Generation methods that relate language models to knowledge bases. This will assist in ensuring that generated responses have been based on verifiable company information as opposed to depending on predictive text generation.

title: Generative AI in Insurance: Keerthi Amistapuram Explores Smarter Claims Documentation and Customer Communication
paragraph: These will be instruments that are meant to ensure that there is clarity and consistency in communication. Notably, the study does not advance an idea that AI is an alternative to intricate human decision-making but highlights the system as a part of organizing structured interactions.

title: Generative AI in Insurance: Keerthi Amistapuram Explores Smarter Claims Documentation and Customer Communication
paragraph: In regulated business, like the insurance industry, fairness and accuracy are parameters. The work of Keerthi pays much attention to the systems of governance that can be used to reduce the risks related to generative AI systems.

title: Generative AI in Insurance: Keerthi Amistapuram Explores Smarter Claims Documentation and Customer Communication
paragraph: To address these risks, the framework suggests the stratified validation schemes, such as the vectorized document retrieval systems and the structured database queries that position the outputs by the authoritative data sources. On-going governance practices which are also advised are bias monitoring and fairness testing.

title: Generative AI in Insurance: Keerthi Amistapuram Explores Smarter Claims Documentation and Customer Communication
paragraph: One of the key suggestions of the study is embracing generative AI on a step-by-step basis. Instead of starting with the transformation of the whole enterprise at once, insurers can start with narrow use cases like internal claims documentation standardization or high-volume informational responses.

title: Generative AI in Insurance: Keerthi Amistapuram Explores Smarter Claims Documentation and Customer Communication
paragraph: With the help of pre-trained models via API integrations, insurers can invest in user experience and workflow enhancements without making a massive investment in infrastructure transformation.

title: Generative AI in Insurance: Keerthi Amistapuram Explores Smarter Claims Documentation and Customer Communication
paragraph: The works of Keerthi Amistapuram are a well-designed plan on how to implement generative AI in insurance operations without regulatory drift and human control. Her publication combines the knowledge of enterprise software engineering with practical AI studies and shows how automation could be used to improve document quality and the efficiency of communication.

title: Generative AI in Insurance: Keerthi Amistapuram Explores Smarter Claims Documentation and Customer Communication
paragraph: With the maturity of generative AI technologies, insurers will probably keep trying to integrate intelligent systems into claim workflows. The research by Keerthi is a contribution to this emerging debate in that it describes a balanced solution, that is, one that will stress operational benefits and enhance verification, fairness, and accountability in the highly regulated settings.

title: Matchbest Group Launches Xelta Ai, A Generative AI Platform Designed to Transform Creative Intelligence
paragraph: New Delhi [India], March 5: In a major development in the rapidly evolving world of artificial intelligence, Matchbest Group has launched its new generative AI platform Xelta.ai, introducing a system designed not just to generate content but to orchestrate complete creative ecosystems.

title: Matchbest Group Launches Xelta Ai, A Generative AI Platform Designed to Transform Creative Intelligence
paragraph: The platform was officially unveiled this week by Matchbest Group CEO Vishal Arya, who described the initiative as a step toward redefining how ideas are transformed into scalable digital experiences.

title: Matchbest Group Launches Xelta Ai, A Generative AI Platform Designed to Transform Creative Intelligence
paragraph: Xelta.ai introduces what the company calls structured creative infrastructure, built around a proprietary AI engine known as Content Flow™. The system enables a single idea to evolve into a fully integrated multi-format digital presence, bringing together storytelling, learning, marketing, branding, and distribution within one unified AI Studio.

title: Matchbest Group Launches Xelta Ai, A Generative AI Platform Designed to Transform Creative Intelligence
paragraph: Unlike traditional AI generators that operate as isolated tools, Xelta.ai functions as a centralized creative system where users can develop entire content ecosystems from one concept. Through its Content Flow™ architecture, a simple idea can be transformed into microdrama series designed for mobile audiences, AI-generated comics, structured microcourses for learning platforms, promotional campaigns, AI-powered home design visualizations, and performance-driven advertising creatives.

title: Matchbest Group Launches Xelta Ai, A Generative AI Platform Designed to Transform Creative Intelligence
paragraph: The platform also includes a Smart Ads Engine for optimized marketing campaigns and LinkedIn AutoPost, which enables automated professional publishing and thought leadership distribution.

title: Matchbest Group Launches Xelta Ai, A Generative AI Platform Designed to Transform Creative Intelligence
paragraph: The workflow of the platform follows a structured transformation pipeline -- moving from idea to script, script to visual, visual to course, course to promotion, and finally to distribution. This integrated approach allows creators, educators, brands, and entrepreneurs to build complete digital ecosystems without relying on multiple disconnected platforms.

title: Matchbest Group Launches Xelta Ai, A Generative AI Platform Designed to Transform Creative Intelligence
paragraph: Speaking about the launch, Matchbest Group CEO Vishal Arya said the platform was developed to empower creators, entrepreneurs, educators, and enterprises to convert ideas into intelligent and scalable experiences. He also expressed gratitude to the company's partners, development team, and supporters who contributed to turning the vision into reality.

title: Matchbest Group Launches Xelta Ai, A Generative AI Platform Designed to Transform Creative Intelligence
paragraph: With Xelta.ai, Matchbest Group positions itself at the intersection of generative AI, creative automation, micro-learning, performance marketing, and digital storytelling infrastructure. The platform aims to address the growing demand for systems that combine speed, creativity, and strategic structure in the digital economy.

title: Matchbest Group Launches Xelta Ai, A Generative AI Platform Designed to Transform Creative Intelligence
paragraph: Designed as an all-in-one AI Creative Studio, Xelta.ai integrates tools for text generation, visual creation, video storytelling, course development, campaign design, and professional publishing. Built for creators, marketers, agencies, product teams, and professionals, the platform enables seamless workflows from idea to creation, optimization, and distribution.

title: Matchbest Group Launches Xelta Ai, A Generative AI Platform Designed to Transform Creative Intelligence
paragraph: Its AI-powered creative suite allows users to produce cinematic microdramas, comics, interactive courses, promotional media, and AI-generated visuals within a single workspace. Integrated editing tools also support background removal, asset refinement, branded layouts, campaign templates, and production-ready media creation.

title: Matchbest Group Launches Xelta Ai, A Generative AI Platform Designed to Transform Creative Intelligence
paragraph: Business-focused features such as the Smart Ads Engine ensure that content not only looks creative but also performs effectively in marketing environments. Meanwhile, professional tools like LinkedIn AutoPost and the Thought Leadership Toolkit help leaders and entrepreneurs maintain a consistent professional presence through automated publishing.

title: Matchbest Group Launches Xelta Ai, A Generative AI Platform Designed to Transform Creative Intelligence
paragraph: With the launch of Xelta.ai, Matchbest Group CEO Vishal Arya emphasized that artificial intelligence is moving beyond simple content generation toward the orchestration of structured creative ecosystems. The platform represents a shift in how digital ideas are transformed into scalable media, learning, and marketing assets for the modern digital economy.

title: Pocket FM partners with OpenAI to scale AI-led storytelling and multilingual audio production
paragraph: Audio entertainment platform Pocket FM has partnered with OpenAI to integrate advanced artificial intelligence tools into its content creation ecosystem, as the company looks to accelerate production and scale its global catalogue of audio series.

title: Pocket FM partners with OpenAI to scale AI-led storytelling and multilingual audio production
paragraph: The collaboration will see Pocket FM deploy OpenAI’s APIs across multiple workstreams in its production pipeline, enabling creators on the platform to generate studio-quality audio content faster and in multiple languages. The move is aimed at strengthening the platform’s content infrastructure that currently supports more than 300,000 creators globally.

title: Pocket FM partners with OpenAI to scale AI-led storytelling and multilingual audio production
paragraph: The company said the partnership builds on its broader shift toward AI-led storytelling that began in 2023, when it rebuilt its content stack around generative AI technologies. Since then, the platform has witnessed rapid growth in AI-driven content creation.

title: Pocket FM partners with OpenAI to scale AI-led storytelling and multilingual audio production
paragraph: Pocket FM now hosts more than 100,000 AI-native audio series, with AI-led titles emerging as the fastest-growing segment on the platform. According to the company, AI-driven shows are expanding at an average of nearly 30% month-on-month, reflecting growing demand for long-form episodic audio storytelling.

title: Pocket FM partners with OpenAI to scale AI-led storytelling and multilingual audio production
paragraph: “At Pocket FM, AI is foundational to everything we do,” said Prateek Dixit, cofounder—product, tech and AI at Pocket FM. “By combining OpenAI’s APIs with our content infrastructure and creator ecosystem, we aim to build an entertainment platform where a single creator anywhere in the world can produce, publish, and reach millions of listeners with the quality and consistency of a full production studio.”

title: Pocket FM partners with OpenAI to scale AI-led storytelling and multilingual audio production
paragraph: The integration will also enhance the platform’s localisation capabilities, allowing stories created in one language to be adapted and distributed across multiple global markets. This is expected to support Pocket FM’s international expansion strategy as it seeks to take more creator-led titles to audiences worldwide.

title: Pocket FM partners with OpenAI to scale AI-led storytelling and multilingual audio production
paragraph: Oliver Jay, managing director—international at OpenAI, said the collaboration illustrates how AI can expand creative opportunities while keeping creators at the centre of storytelling.

title: Pocket FM partners with OpenAI to scale AI-led storytelling and multilingual audio production
paragraph: “Pocket FM is demonstrating how AI can help creators scale storytelling for global audiences. Our collaboration brings OpenAI’s technology into their creator ecosystem to support faster content creation, localisation, and distribution,” Jay said.

title: Pocket FM partners with OpenAI to scale AI-led storytelling and multilingual audio production
paragraph: Pocket FM said its platform records more than 12 billion minutes of listening every month, driven by the popularity of serialized, binge-worthy audio content. The company claims a global listener base of over 250 million.

title: Pocket FM partners with OpenAI to scale AI-led storytelling and multilingual audio production
paragraph: Founded as an audio series platform focused on long-form episodic storytelling, Pocket FM has increasingly positioned itself as an AI-first entertainment company. By combining human creativity with generative AI tools, the platform aims to help writers develop stories faster, adapt them across languages, and scale successful intellectual properties for global audiences.

title: Aye Finance pilots Generative AI model for image-based underwriting of trading businesses
paragraph: New Delhi [India], March 4: Aye Finance, India's leading provider of business loans to the underserved micro-scale MSMEs, has completed a pilot that uses the predictive capability of Gen AI technology, which will enhance its formal credit to the trading businesses in tier 2 and beyond cities. The cutting-edge solution developed in-house utilises Generative AI and Machine Learning (ML) models to estimate business sales directly from images of store premises and other parameters. This significantly reduces the 'cost-to-serve' for the micro-enterprise segment.

title: Aye Finance pilots Generative AI model for image-based underwriting of trading businesses
paragraph: Aye Finance is the first NBFC to have received equity investment from Google Capital in 2018. It set up its Data Science and Artificial Intelligence Unit in 2019 and has successfully deployed many customised ML models at key processes across the customer lifecycle. This optimizes the unit economics and allows inclusion of a larger population of the grassroots businesses.

title: Aye Finance pilots Generative AI model for image-based underwriting of trading businesses
paragraph: The newly developed system serves a critical segment of trading stores by transforming their unstructured data--specifically, store images--into actionable financial insights. It is built on Aye Finance's extensive internal datasets and is rigorously tested for consistency.

title: Aye Finance pilots Generative AI model for image-based underwriting of trading businesses
paragraph: By using a Multimodal Large Language Model (MLLM) integrated with proprietary ML models, the solution provides a reliable estimate of monthly sales of a garment store or a grocery store using store images as input.

title: Aye Finance pilots Generative AI model for image-based underwriting of trading businesses
paragraph: This breakthrough innovation significantly reduces reliance on subjective individual judgment, ensuring a more standardised and fair income estimation process. By automating these complex components of underwriting, Aye is now able to process applications with unprecedented speed with high levels of consistency in underwriting. This opens up the possibility of extending this methodology to other sectors and industries beyond trading by Aye.

title: Aye Finance pilots Generative AI model for image-based underwriting of trading businesses
paragraph: "Our leadership in lending to the underserved segment of micro MSMEs has been rooted in superior operational efficiency," said Mr Sanjay Sharma, Managing Director, Aye Finance Ltd. "This GenAI integration builds on our established efficiency. By automating income estimation through Generative AI, we will substantially reduce manual fieldwork with an accelerated, data-driven system that increases both the speed and the reliability of our credit decisions. Aye has demonstrated that lending to micro-enterprise business is a rewarding opportunity, when illuminated by our advanced, technology supported lens."

title: Aye Finance pilots Generative AI model for image-based underwriting of trading businesses
paragraph: For 60 million micro-entrepreneurs in India's tier 2 cities and beyond, the lack of formal accounting records and 'paper trails' has traditionally been a barrier to credit. As a Middle-Layer Non-Banking Financial Company (NBFC-ML), Aye Finance has been successfully solving the credit challenges of the sector since 2014 and offers tailored working capital and expansion loans, typically secured against working assets or property. The company recently closed a successful IPO, raising INR 1050 crores and further strengthening its capital base.

title: Aye Finance pilots Generative AI model for image-based underwriting of trading businesses
paragraph: Aye Finance is a non-banking financial company - middle layer ("NBFC-ML") focused on providing loans to micro-scale "MSMEs" across India. Aye offers a range of business loans for working capital and business expansion needs, against hypothecation of working assets or against security of property to customers across manufacturing, trading & service sectors. Aye is among the leading non-banking financial companies ("NBFCs") providing business loans to the largely underserved micro-scale enterprises in India, with 586,825 active unique customers across 18 states and 3 union territories and with assets under management ("AUM") of ₹ 60,276.22 million, as of September 30, 2025. Aye offers small-ticket business loans with an average ticket size ("ATS") on disbursement of ₹ 0.18 million to micro enterprises. The lenders' expertise in underwriting business cash flows of a variety of business clusters has enabled it to maintain stable credit costs and allowed the Company to profitably scale up operations.
